name: shipwright
description: The operating doctrine for autonomous build-and-ship work: the loop to run, which sibling skill to reach for and how they chain, and the disciplines that keep the work honest. Loaded when about to build/code/ship or run a self-directed work loop, so a fleet of agents ships the same way. Sits above fixer / perfection / walkabout / honesty / decisions / brainstrust — not a router, the method that runs while you use them.
